name: default
description: Expandable truncation clamped to three lines, with a 'Show more' toggle button, for a product description.

props.children: This premium ergonomic chair is designed for professionals who spend long hours at their desk. The lumbar support is adjustable to fit your unique spine curvature, and the breathable mesh back ensures airflow throughout the day. Available in five colors and ships within 3–5 business days to most regions.

name: hard-clamp
description: Non-expandable two-line clamp for a card subtitle where overflow is silently hidden.

props.children: Explore the latest collection of hand-crafted ceramics, each piece uniquely glazed and fired in small batches by artisans across the Pacific Northwest.
